goal: Physically fill all remaining missing card-art files in public/assets/cards using the current verified faction/universal fallback assets, so every showcase card ID resolves to a real on-disk file.
constraints: Create and reference a conflict arbitration record before implementation because the implementation path differs from another AI proposal.
Do not change card IDs or card-data sources.
Match file extensions to the current asset resolution rules so runtime loads the new files directly.
deliverables: Remaining missing card-art files physically created in public/assets/cards.
A conflict arbitration record documenting why physical fallback copies were chosen first.
A verification report with the final missing-count result.
